---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea — new connector, extractor, metric, or UI improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What gap does this fill? (e.g. "work orders live in SAP-PM, not spreadsheets")

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen. Note which module it touches
(M1 ingest / M2 P&ID / M3 retrieval / M5 compliance / M6 patterns / UI).

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they're worse.

**Additional context**
Sample documents, links, or sketches.
